data.name: Hentai Kaiya
data.detailed_description:
"Hentai Kaiya" is a unique puzzle in which the image is divided into 8 pieces and the player should move the puzzle pieces of the playing field to restore the original image.
This is a simple, exciting game that requires logical thinking and the ability to plan your actions.
Enjoy the game process to reproduce photos of beautiful girls and relax with relaxing music. The game also has a "GOD" mode, try it if you tired of collecting puzzles.
  • 30 levels
  • 30 achievements
  • Relaxing and romantic music

data.short_description: What could be more beautiful than hentai?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8,8.1,10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體

  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
